data.name: Disconnect_Confirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to disconnect?

data.name: Users_SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by name, login or email...

data.name: Compare_EqualizeTooltip
data.value: Copy all groups in both directions

data.name: Compare_CopyAllToUser2Tooltip
data.value: Copy all groups from User 1 to User 2

data.name: Compare_CopyAllToUser1Tooltip
data.value: Copy all groups from User 2 to User 1

data.name: CreateUser_FormatSettingsHint
data.value: Format configurable in Settings › User Creation

data.name: CreateUser_TemplateOptionsHint
data.value: These options will be saved in the template and automatically applied when creating a user from this template.

data.name: CreateUser_ResetConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to reset all fields? Unsaved data will be lost.

data.name: CreateUser_ChangePasswordNextLogonDesc
data.value: User will need to set a new password

data.name: CreateUser_PasswordNeverExpiresDesc
data.value: Not recommended for standard user accounts

data.name: CreateUser_CreateDisabledDesc
data.value: Account will be created but access blocked

data.name: CreateUser_ExpirationDateDesc
data.value: The account will expire on this date

data.name: CreateUser_SuccessDetail
CreateUser_ErrorOUNotFound
CreateUser_ErrorAlreadyExists
data.value: User '{0}' already exists in Active Directory.

data.name: CreateUser_ErrorPasswordPolicy
data.value: The password does not meet the domain security policy. Check complexity and minimum length requirements.

data.name: History_NoActionsSub
data.value: AD actions will be tracked here automatically

data.name: Templates_NoTemplatesSub
data.value: Create your first template from the User Creation page

data.name: Login_CredentialStorage
data.value: 🔒 Encrypted storage via Windows Credential Manager

data.name: Login_Timeout
data.value: Connection timeout (15s). Check your network and domain.

data.name: Login_Failed
data.value: Connection failed. Check your credentials and domain.

data.name: Settings_RestartRequired
data.value: Language changed. Please restart the application.

data.name: Settings_DisabledOUDesc
data.value: If set, the disabled user will be moved to this OU. On reactivation, they will be moved back to the creation OU.

data.name: Settings_IncludedOUsDesc
data.value: Only users in these OUs will be displayed

data.name: Settings_ExcludedOUsDesc
data.value: Users in these OUs will not be displayed

data.name: Settings_LoadGroupsOnStartupDesc
data.value: Uncheck to improve performance on large domains or AD 2012 R2. Groups remain accessible via double-click.

data.name: Settings_UserCreationDesc
data.value: Configure automatic formats for login, display name, and duplicate handling when creating a user.

data.name: Settings_EmailDomainDesc
data.value: If set (e.g. example.com), will be used for email and UPN instead of the default AD domain.

data.name: Settings_Policy_StandardDesc
data.value: Standard: 12+ chars, mixed case + digit + special

data.name: Settings_CacheDesc
data.value: The cache speeds up loading of users, groups and computers. Data is automatically refreshed according to the configured TTL.

data.name: Settings_NetworkLogsDesc
data.value: Critical actions will be logged to the network for auditing

data.name: Settings_NetworkSwitchWarning
data.value:
You are enabling one or more network paths. After saving, the application will use these network locations as the primary source.
Existing local data will not be deleted, but will no longer be active while network mode is enabled.
Do you want to continue?

data.name: Settings_NetworkDirMissingIntro
data.value: The following network folders do not exist yet. The application can create them automatically:

data.name: Settings_NetworkDirCreatePrompt
data.value: Would you like to create these folders and update the paths?

data.name: Settings_HistoryDesc
data.value: Configure audit log storage to track all AD actions.

data.name: Settings_AuditLocalDesc
data.value: Local: each workstation has its own database.

data.name: Settings_AuditNetworkDesc
data.value: Shared network: all users share the same database (centralized audit).

data.name: Settings_AuditNetworkPathDesc
data.value: All workstations using this path will share the same history.

data.name: Settings_TemplatesDesc
data.value: Templates allow you to quickly pre-fill user creation forms with standard configurations.

data.name: Settings_TemplateLocalDesc
data.value: Local: templates stored in AppData (per workstation).

data.name: Settings_TemplateNetworkDesc
data.value: Shared network: templates shared between all users.

data.name: Settings_TemplateNetworkPathDesc
data.value: UNC path of the network folder. All users with access will share the same templates.

data.name: Settings_CacheClearConfirm
data.value:
Clear cache?
Next load will be slower (data fetched from AD).

data.name: Settings_ImportConfirm
data.value:
Import this configuration?
Current settings will be replaced.

data.name: Packages_DeployMultiConfirm
data.value: You are about to deploy {0} package(s) ({1}) to {2} computer(s). This action is irreversible. Continue?

data.name: Packages_TimeoutRunningNote
data.value: ⚠ The timeout was exceeded but the installer was still running on these PCs (installation probably succeeded):

data.name: Packages_TimeoutRunningOffer
data.value:
Deploying "{0}" to {1} exceeded the timeout ({2}s) but the installer was still running.
The installation probably succeeded. Do you want to increase the timeout to {3}s for this package?

data.name: CreatePackage_SystemInfo
data.value: Installation always runs as LOCAL SYSTEM via a temporary Windows service

data.name: CreatePackage_HashPlaceholder
data.value: Automatically computed when a file is selected

data.name: Packages_DeployBatchConfirm
data.value: You are about to deploy "{1}" to {0} computers. This action is irreversible. Continue?

data.name: CreatePackage_StepsJsonDesc
data.value: Define steps: preCheck, install, postInstall, cleanup. JSON array format.

data.name: CreatePackage_CriteriaJsonDesc
data.value: Type: fileExists, registryKey, exitCode. Single JSON object.

data.name: CreatePackage_AutoDetectPartial
data.value: Partial detection — only the file name was retrieved

data.name: CreatePackage_AutoDetectPS1
data.value: PowerShell script detected — type set automatically

data.name: CreatePackage_StepsWarning
data.value: Custom steps are saved in the package but are not yet executed by the deployment engine. This field is reserved for a future version.

data.name: CreatePackage_CriteriaWarning
data.value: Only the "fileExists" criterion is currently checked after installation. The registryKey and exitCode types are ignored.

data.name: CreatePackage_OwnerBadge
data.value: You are the owner of this package

data.name: Packages_EditNoKey
data.value: This package is signed. You must hold the signing key to modify it.

data.name: DeployConfirm_Irreversible
data.value: This action is irreversible. Verify your selection before confirming.

data.name: DeployResults_HintFileLocked
data.value: Manually clean C:\Windows\ADFlowManager\Deploy on {0} then retry.

data.name: DeployResults_HintTimeoutOk
data.value: Installation likely completed. Check to double the timeout.

data.name: DeployResults_HintTimeout
data.value: Verify manually if the application is installed on {0}. Check to double the timeout.

data.name: Msg_ConfirmDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

data.name: CreateUser_ClipboardWarning
data.value: ⚠️ Password copied — clipboard will be cleared automatically in {0}s

data.name: Login_ErrorGeneric
data.value: Login failed. Check your credentials or contact your administrator.

data.name: CreateUser_TemplateSaveError
data.value: Unable to save the template. Check the logs for details.

data.name: CreateUser_ErrorInvalidName
data.value: First name or last name contains unauthorized characters

data.name: Settings_InvalidPath
data.value: The path "{0}" contains forbidden sequences (.., ~). Please use an absolute path.

data.name: Settings_PackageStorageDesc
data.value: Packages are stored locally in AppData. An optional network path allows sharing packages between workstations.

data.name: Settings_SigningDesc
data.value: ECDSA signing ensures package integrity and authenticity. Signed packages are automatically verified before each deployment.

data.name: Settings_GenerateKeyConfirm
data.value: Generate a new ECDSA P-256 key? The existing key will be replaced if present.

data.name: Settings_DeleteKeyConfirm
data.value: Delete the signing key? Already signed packages will no longer be verifiable.

data.name: Settings_ImportKeyReplaceConfirm
data.value: A signing key is already configured. Importing will replace it — packages signed with the old key will no longer be verifiable. Continue?

data.name: Settings_DeploymentLimitsDesc
data.value: Controls the maximum number of simultaneous deployments across the entire system.

data.name: Settings_MaxGlobalDeploymentsHint
data.value: All batches combined. Takes effect on restart. (default: 15)

data.name: Settings_DeploymentRestartNote
data.value: ⚠ This setting takes effect on application restart.

data.name: Settings_RequireSignedPackagesDesc
data.value: When enabled, only packages with a valid ECDSA signature can be deployed. Unsigned or invalid-signature packages will be blocked.

data.name: Deploy_UnsignedBlocked
data.value: Deploying unsigned packages is prohibited. Enable signing or disable the requirement in settings.
